name: Masters Credit Consultants
description_short: Masters Credit Consultants disputes negative and erroneous items on credit reports to help consumers improve their scores and achieve financial goals like homeownership.
description_long:
Masters Credit Consultants is a veteran-owned credit repair company that helps consumers remove negative and wrongful claims from their credit histories. Founded to serve those struggling with poor credit scores, the company assigns each client a personal credit expert who manages their file from start to finish.

The company offers credit analysis, credit repair and building services, and credit repair consultations. They work with credit bureaus to dispute and remove negative items, helping clients track progress through a complimentary Client Tracking Portal. Their service packages are customized based on individual consultation results, and they offer tiered pricing with a 50% discount on the first month for military veterans.

Masters Credit Consultants distinguishes itself through personalized account management, transparent progress tracking, and a goal-oriented approach. Rather than one-size-fits-all solutions, they tailor programs to help clients achieve specific objectives like purchasing a home, qualifying for car insurance, starting a business, or securing new credit cards. Client testimonials indicate they've helped users remove collections accounts, hard inquiries, and duplicate addresses, with reported score improvements from the 400s to 650-700 range within 8 months.

Like all credit repair companies, Masters Credit Consultants cannot remove accurate negative items from credit reports—only disputes inaccurate or unverifiable information. Results depend heavily on the accuracy of disputed items and bureau responsiveness. While testimonials are positive, consumer finance research shows credit repair outcomes vary significantly, and consumers should have realistic expectations about what can actually be removed versus what simply ages off reports naturally.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Veteran-owned business with 50% discount on first month for military members
Assigns personal credit expert to manage each client's file throughout the process
Complimentary Client Tracking Portal for transparent progress monitoring
Customized service packages based on individual credit analysis consultation
Reported success removing collections accounts, hard inquiries, and duplicate addresses
Free initial credit consultation with no obligation
Multiple customer testimonials documenting score improvements and successful goal achievement
cons: Cannot remove accurate negative information—only disputes inaccurate or unverifiable items
No pricing transparency on website; costs only revealed after consultation
Results vary significantly by individual; testimonials do not guarantee similar outcomes
Heavy reliance on credit bureau cooperation and dispute responsiveness, which is unpredictable
8-month improvement timeline in testimonials suggests results take considerable time
best_for: Consumers with errors or fraudulent items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance
Military veterans and active duty personnel seeking credit repair with cost savings
Those with specific financial goals (homeownership, business ownership, auto purchase) who need credit improvement
Consumers frustrated with credit bureaus and seeking an intermediary to handle disputes
diagnosis: Masters Credit Consultants is best for consumers with verifiable errors or fraudulent items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance and personalized account management. The main caveat is that credit repair can only remove inaccurate or unverifiable negative items—not accurate negative information—and results are unpredictable and depend on credit bureau responsiveness.
services: Personal credit expert assignment for file management
Client Tracking Portal for progress monitoring
Duplicate address removal from credit reports
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 101 S Church St Floor 1, Spartanburg, SC 29306
